active_slots_coefficient.description: The proportion of slots in which blocks should be issued

update_quorum.description: Determines the quorum needed for votes on the protocol parameter updates

max_lovelace_supply.description: The total number of lovelace in the system

epoch_length.description: Number of slots in an epoch

system_start.description: Time of slot 0 in UNIX time

slots_per_kes_period.description: Number of slots in an KES period

slot_length.description: Duration of one slot in seconds

max_kes_evolutions.description: The maximum number of time a KES key can be evolved before a pool operator must create a new operational certificate
